name: gate-stdlib-hook-accept
description: The contract references `useGeolocation` under `@ggui-ai/gadgets` — one of the seven first-party browser-capability hooks. The app's catalog is the `STDLIB_GADGETS` baseline: the single `@ggui-ai/gadgets` package descriptor whose `exports` carry all seven stdlib hooks. The `(package, export)` pair resolves, so the gate MUST accept. (When a real app row carries no explicit catalog, the push handler substitutes `STDLIB_GADGETS` before calling the gate — this case provides that baseline directly.)
